pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.x to 3.2.x to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE (jakarta.*) instead of Java EE (javax.*). Code using javax.annotation will fail to compile or link at runtime without this migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Spring Boot 3.x Jakarta EE migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes support for javax.* packages. Using javax.annotation will result in ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors if the code imports javax.annotation.PostConstruct etc.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target levels from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: To utilize Java 21 features and ensure the bytecode is compatible with the target JDK 21 runtime.
Tika 3.x is required for compatibility with newer dependencies and security fixes; older versions may have conflicts with Spring Boot 3.x managed dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit PDFBox 2.x exclusions and dependencies, relying on Tika 3.x managed versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Tika 3.x manages its own PDFBox dependencies (likely 3.x). Explicitly forcing PDFBox 2.x causes version conflicts and potential runtime errors.
Security patches and bug fixes in newer POI versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Commons Compress to 1.27.1 via dependencyManagement to fix CVE-2024-25710.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Commons Compress have known security vulnerabilities.
Ensure compatibility with Java 21 and latest compiler plugins.
Ensure proper support for Java 21 compilation features.
Better support for Java 21 test execution and JVM arguments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Spring Boot Maven Plugin to use a classifier for the fat JAR.
pom.xml.why_exists: Allows publishing the standard thin JAR to Maven Central while keeping the executable fat JAR for local use, avoiding repository pollution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Sonatype Central Publisher plugin for Maven Central deployment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for publishing artifacts to the new Central Portal API.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add GPG signing plugin for artifact release.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required by Maven Central for artifact integrity verification.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Source and Javadoc plugins for Maven Central release requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven Central requires source and javadoc artifacts for published libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Windows profile to switch console encoding to GBK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Prevents Chinese character garbling in Windows CMD consoles which default to GBK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Quick profile to skip GPG signing during development.
pom.xml.why_exists: Speeds up local builds by skipping time-consuming signing operations.

src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/impl/inde.general_idea: Add null and open-state checks before committing the index to prevent exceptions on closed writers.
Catch AlreadyClosedException during commit to handle race conditions or double-closes gracefully.
Add open-state check before closing the writer to prevent exceptions on already closed resources.
Catch AlreadyClosedException during close to handle race conditions or double-closes gracefully.

src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/optimizat.general_idea: Refactor constructors to support optional chunking configuration and storage service injection.
Update extractRelevantPart to prioritize the new chunker if available, falling back to legacy logic.

Implement selectBestChunks to filter and sort document chunks based on relevance and length constraints.
